クラス FlinsParty2RLSimulatorFactory

java.lang.Object
mechanics.rl.FlinsParty2RLSimulatorFactory
public final class FlinsParty2RLSimulatorFactory extends Object
Creates the fixed FlinsParty2 simulator used by Java-native RL.
